name: Doctor Bird Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Add the diced bananas, oil, crushed pineapple, vanilla, and eggs to the sifted dry ingredients. Stir until fully combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased angel food cake pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
5. Allow the cake to cool on a rack without removing it from the pan.
6. Serve plain, with whipped cream, ice cream, or your preferred topping.
